title: Golden Baked Potato
description: Why should carrots get all of the fun? Add golden potatoes with this datapack!
body:
# MAKE SURE TO DOWNLOAD THE LATEST VERSION OF THE DATAPACK/MOD TO AVOID ISSUES!
**For some reason, Minecraft only has golden carrots! Why is this? Why are the good ol' taters left in the dust?**\
With this datapack, you can change that! By using the same crafting recipe as a golden carrot but with a baked potato instead of a carrot, you can craft the amazing golden baked potato! This shiny spud will give you 8 food points and a whopping 16.8 saturation! _(Calculated by subtracting the stats of a carrot from those of a baked potato, then adding the stats of a golden carrot.)_ So, what are you waiting for? Get a crafting table and make Idaho proud!\
Remember, kids: make sure to add the data pack in your world's datapacks folder for it to work and in your resource packs folder to make it look good - this file is multi-functional! If you don't feel like using a texture pack, you can install it as a mod, which is supported by forge, fabric, quilt, and neoforge! Yippee!

Here's a picture of the recipe:\
![A crafting grid with a baked potato in the center and gold nuggets surrounding it, and a resulting gold colored potato.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8960ebe194cf2f054831d812f1b023c5e13f0df7_0.webp)\
_(Psst! Don't tell anyone, but the golden baked potato is really just a poisonous potato that tastes and looks better and doesn't give you indigestion!)_

**CREDITS:**\
Making the datapack - me\
Golden Baked Potato texture - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alez-combat-upgrades](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alez-combat-upgrades)\
Oh and thanks to modrinth for making it really easy to turn a datapack into a mod!
